entity.title: Note
entity.description: A supplemental explanation attached to a specific rule, providing clarification, context, or elaboration.

rules.body: IS associated with a single rule and must reference the rule's identifier explicitly (e.g., [<rule id>/<incremental note id (OOn)]).
A Note provides clarification, context, or elaboration and must not modify the rule it supplements.
MUST be stored in the same directory as the entity and rule it references.
MAY include: Business rationale, Examples or use cases, Historical context, Clarifications of terminology.
MUST be versioned and maintained alongside the rules they support.
MUST be concise but may span multiple paragraphs if needed for clarity.
